# ScaleSage

> The business doctor for growing SMEs. We find where your business is leaking revenue, install the systems that close it, and prove the result in numbers. Diagnose. Build. Prove.

This file is a routing aid for AI and search crawlers. It is a signpost to the pages that matter, not a ranking claim.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://scalesage.ai/): what ScaleSage is, and the Diagnose, Build, Prove method.
- [How it works](https://scalesage.ai/how-it-works): the method in three phases, each accountable to a number.
- [Industries](https://scalesage.ai/industries): leak maps across SME sectors.
- [Pricing](https://scalesage.ai/pricing): public monthly pricing and straight-answer FAQs.
- [About](https://scalesage.ai/about): why ScaleSage is not a normal AI agency.
- [Frontier Visibility](https://scalesage.ai/frontier): the whole AI and search visibility layer.
- [Stack Updates](https://scalesage.ai/stack-updates): dated public changelog of what shipped.
- [Catalyst diagnostic](https://scalesage.ai/how-it-works#catalyst): our scan that finds where revenue is leaking, no payment to begin.
